indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space can lead to distractions and lack of privacy.

indicators.name: Concrete walls
indicators.rationale: Concrete walls do not provide any specific benefits or drawbacks for computer work.

indicators.name: Floor tiles
indicators.rationale: Floor tiles do not provide any specific benefits or drawbacks for computer work.

indicators.name: Large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light, which can improve mood and focus during computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is large and open, which might be distracting, but it has large windows that provide natural light, which can be beneficial for computer work.
